cves.audit_signal: Cisco ASA WebVPN portal HTML output reflects user-supplied 'NextURL' without escaping (XSS via WebVPN)

cves.expected_fix:
sed -i '/^[[:space:]]*cluster[[:space:]]\+enable/d; /^[[:space:]]*cluster[[:space:]]\+member/d' /etc/cisco/running-config.txt
sed -i 's/transport input telnet/transport input ssh/' /etc/cisco/running-config.txt
